title: UK/Azerbaijan foreign policy dialogue
body: " The Ministers discussions covered a wide range of issues, including the EU’s Eastern Partnership, the conflict in Nagorno-Karabakh, Syria, the situation in Ukraine, as well as human rights and governance issues.  Following the meeting, David Lidington said:  “The UK and Azerbaijan have a strong bilateral relationship, so I welcome the establishment of this important new forum. It presents good opportunities to continue to exchange views and increase understanding on important bilateral and international issues.”  Further information  Follow Foreign Office Minister David Lidington on twitter @DLidington  Follow the Foreign Office on twitter @foreignoffice  Follow the Foreign Office on facebook and Google+   Media enquiries   For journalists     Email newsdesk@fco.gov.uk         "
